about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.bio1: I'm a passionate Frontend Developer and Mars IT School intern specializing in building exceptional digital experiences. With expertise in React and modern web technologies, I create modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications.
about.bio2: Currently learning and growing at Mars IT School, I'm constantly improving my skills to stay up-to-date with the latest web technologies and best practices. My goal is to create digital experiences that are not only visually appealing but also highly functional and accessible.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, working on personal projects, and sharing my learning journey through blog posts and social media.
about.feature1Desc: Writing maintainable, scalable, and well-documented code.
about.feature2Desc: Creating pixel-perfect interfaces with attention to detail.
about.feature3Desc: Optimizing for speed, accessibility, and user experience.
